titleStmt.title: SII 38.155: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 155. (A.R. No. 155 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the eighteenth pillar, round the central shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Beginning is damaged. It records that the sabhās of Ādambākkam and Savaṇṇa in Surattūr-nāḍu, a division of Puliyūr-kōṭṭam sold 4000 kuḻi of land by auction to a lady Nāgalappaichchāṉi, wife of Prabhākara Bhaṭṭaṉ of Mēṟkaḷāpuram in Āryadēśam after freeing the land from taxes. It further mentions that the land was meant to maintain the three kuḍigaḷ (gardeners) who tended the temple garden, Veṇkādudēvaṉ which was to supply 4 tiruppaḷḷittāmam to the god of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. Two house sites each measuring 25(1/2) kuḻi were given to those three kuḍis by the above said local assemblies. These kuḍis residing in those houses were also exempted from contributing veṭṭi, etc. The inscription further informs both that the sabhās also undertook the responsibility of cultivating the land and measuring out 60 kalam of paddy by the measure Rājakēsari at the Tiruvoṟṟiyūr-uḍaiyar temple treasury.

It further records that 30 kāśu had also been invested with the ūrār of Piraiyapākkam in Eḻumūr-nāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam, who were asked to remit 30 kalam of paddy annually at the temple treasury, towards the paddy (levy in kind) and kāśu (levy in cash) payable to the above said kuḍis in maintaining the garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ndradevarkku yāṇṭu [3 10] Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattup puḻalṉāṭṭut ti
ruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam puliyūrkkoṭṭattuc curattūr ṉāṭṭu Ātampākkattu
sabh[aiyo]mum savaṇṇa sabhaiyomum nilavilaiyāvaṇakaiyeḻuttu Āriyatecattu
meṟkaḷāpurattup pirabhākarabhaṭṭaṉ brāhmaṇi nakkayeṉpaccāṉiRead nākalappaic cāṉiyāna Āriyavammai
tām tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyārkku nālu tiruppaḷḷittāmattukku vaitta tiruna
ntavāṉam veṇkāṭu tevaṉ UḻakkuṅRead uḻuṅkuṭikaḷkuṭikaḷ muvar(ṟ)kku nellukkum poṉṉu
kkumāka nāṅkaḷ kaiyiḻicci yiṟaiyiliyāka viṟkiṉṟa nilamāvatu Ivvūrt teṉkaḻa
ṉit teṉikuḷattiṉ kiḻ Araiyarvatikkuk kiḻakkut tiruviṉantiśvara vāykkāliṉ va
ṭa kaṇṇāṟṟu nilam viṟpataṟkuk kiḻpāṟkellai kuṭimakkaḷ nilattukku meṟkiṉun
tenpāṟkellai tiruvaṉantiśvaravāykkāliṉ vaṭakkiṉṉum melpāṟkellai
Arayarvatikkuk kiḻakkinum vaṭapāṟkellai tiruṉārāyaṇa vāykkālukkut teṟkiṉṉum I
ṉṉāṉkellai paṭṭa nilattil
ṉ nilaṉ ku Iṉṉāṉkellai
yuḷḷum Akappaṭṭa nilaṉ patiṉaṟu cāṇ kolāl kuḻi nālāyiramum viṟṟukkuṭut
tom Iṉnilattiṟ kiṇokkiyakiṇaṟum meṉokkiyamaramum nirum niroṭukālum I
taṟkeyuriccāka Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatum viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Iṉṉilam Uḻuṅku
ṭikaḷ kuṭiyirukka maṉaiyāka nāṅkaḷiṟaiyiḻacci viṟṟuk kuṭutta maṉaiyāvaṉa Eṅkaḷur te
ṉ kaḻaṉit tāmotira vāykālin teṉ kaṇṇāṟṟu Atti kuḻiāṉRead kiḻāṉ ceri maṉaikkuk kiḻpāṟke
llai Ālappākkattuc ceṭṭayak kiramavittaṉ nilattukku meṟkiṉṉun teṉpāṟkellai ku
ṭi makkaḷ nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai vaḻikkuk kiḻaṉṉun vaṭakku pāṟkellai
muññūṟṟu sarvaṇṇaṉ can=tirāccaṉ parameśvaraṉ maṉaikku teṟkiṉṉum naṭuvuppaṭa nila
ttil teṉmaṭal kol muṉ ṟuṅ kiḻ melkel Eṭṭaraiyum Ākappatinaṟu cāṇko
lākkuḻi Irupattaiñcaraiyiṉāl maṉai Oṉṟum Icceriyile kuṭutta maṉaikkuk kiḻa
pāṟkellai taccaṉappaṟikku meṟkkiṉṉun teṉpāṟkellai rācentra coḻamaṅ
kalap perayarMay be read peraraiyarmaṉaikku vaṭakkiṉṉum melpāṟkellai vaḻikkuk kiḻakkiṉum vāḻaip
pantal savaṇṇa cikaṇṭa nan=tiperumāṉ maṉaikkut teṟkum naṭuvuppaṭṭa nilattu teṉ
vaṭalkol muṉṟum kiḻmelkol Eṭṭaraiyum Āka patiṉaṟu cāṇ kolāṟ kuḻiyirupa
ttaiñcaraiyiṉāl maṉai Oṉṟum Āka Imaṉaiyiraṇṭum peṟu vilaik kāṇaṅkiḻikaiyi
ṟ celak koṇṭu Iṟaiyiḻicci viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Iṉṉilam Uḻutu Im maṉaiyilirukku
ṅ kuṭikaḷai veṭṭiya mañci yeccoṟṟukku Uṟiya nelluḷḷiṭṭaṉa Epperpaṭṭa Iṟaikaḷuṅ
koḷḷātatāka viṟṟuk kuṭuttom Ātampākkattu sabhaiyomum savaṇṇasabhaiyo
rum Iṉṉilam nāṅkaḷe Uḻutuṅkuṭikkaṭuttuḻuvittum Iṉṉilattālāṭṭāṇṭu to
ṟum tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār perumpaṇṭārattu rājakecari marakkālālaḷappataṉ nel
lu Aṟupatiṉkalam Iṉnellu Aṟupatiṉkalamum Ācan=tiratāramu tiruvoṟṟiyūr U
ṭaiyār perumpaṇṭāratte Aḷappomāṉom Ātampākkattu sabhaiyomum saṇṇasabhaiyomum
Iṉṉa taṉ vaitta nan=tavānam veṇkāṭutevaṉ Uḻakkuṅ kuṭikaḷ muvarkku nellukkum
poṉnukkumākap paraiyapākkattūraār vacaṅkuṭutta kācu 3 10 Ikkācu muppatuṅ ko
ṇṭu kaṭavom puliyūrkoṭṭattu Eḻumurnāṭṭup piraiya pākkattūrom Ikkācu muppatuṅ ko
ṇṭa paricāvatu Ikkācukku policaiyāka Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum tiruvoṟṟiyūruṭaiyār perumpa
ṇṭārattu rājakecari marakkālālaḷappatāṉa nellu muppatiṉkalam miṉ nellu mu
ppatiṉ kalamum Ācantrakālamum nilaippoliyūṭṭāka Aḷappatāṉom piraiyapākkattūrom
Ittaṉmam Ācan=tiratāramum paṉmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 38.155 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
